hero.title: Motion That Drives Your Industry
hero.subtitle: We supply, engineer, and manufacture conveyor belts under CEMA standards, backed by GBS International Group.

diagnosticCTA.title: Which belt does your operation need?
diagnosticCTA.description: Answer 5 questions and get a professional technical brief with all your application data. A GBS engineer will contact you within 24 business hours.
diagnosticCTA.bullet2: Technical PDF brief with your reference

valuePillars.title: Our Value
valuePillars.pillar1Text: Modular structures built to grow with your operation. Rigorous load analysis and components selected for maximum durability and maintainability.
valuePillars.pillar2Text: Engineering advice via WhatsApp with no sales filters. Fast technical response so your operation never stops.
valuePillars.pillar3Text: Over 8 years in Colombia as members of GBS International Group. National coverage with international standards.

portfolio.title: Our Portfolio
portfolio.subtitle: Integrated solutions for industrial material handling
portfolio.card1Desc: Multi-ply and ST rubber for mining, cement, aggregates, and ports.
portfolio.card2Desc: PU, PVC, silicone, and modular belts for food, logistics, and pharmaceutical.
portfolio.card3Desc: Full conveyor systems under CEMA engineering.
portfolio.card4Desc: CEMA idlers, pulleys, cleaners, and structures.
portfolio.card5Desc: Installation, splicing, maintenance, and turn-key projects.

philosophy.title: Engineering built for your business
philosophy.description: Every project we handle starts with a simple question: what does your operation need to grow without interruptions? From there we design scalable, maintainable solutions built for the long term. It is not just engineering. It is your operation running without limits.

social.title: Connect with GBS
social.subtitle: Follow us for real projects, engineering in action, and technical updates

finalCTA.title: We take your operation to the next level.
finalCTA.description: Talk directly to a GBS engineer. No middlemen. Fast response.

footer.legal: © 2026 GBS Colombia SAS. All rights reserved.

whatsappFloat.label: Chat on WhatsApp
whatsappFloat.defaultMessage: Hi GBS, I'd like information about your conveyor belts.

diagnostic.pageSubtitle: Answer 5 questions and get your GBS technical brief in under 2 minutes.
diagnostic.step1Title: What type of operation do you have?
diagnostic.step3Title: Which conditions apply to your operation?
diagnostic.step5Consent: I agree to receive contact from GBS
diagnostic.briefResponseTime: A GBS engineer will contact you within 24 business hours.

about.title: About
about.heroDescription: GBS Colombia SAS is an engineering company founded in 2016 with headquarters in Pereira. As members of GBS International Group, we share global processes, standards, and know-how applied to the Colombian market.
about.missionText: Motion that drives industry. We engineer and supply material handling systems that operate with precision, safety, and maintainability — applying CEMA standards to every project.
about.visionText: To be the Latin American benchmark in conveyor belt engineering, recognized for technical quality, international backing, and client trust.
about.groupText: As members of the international GBS group, we share processes, technical procedures, design standards, and manufacturing capabilities with operations in multiple countries. This allows us to deliver projects with a level of quality and consistency unusual in the Colombian market.

engineering.title: Engineering
engineering.heroTitle: Design under CEMA Belt Book 7th Edition
engineering.heroDescription: Every GBS project follows a documented engineering process. We don't improvise. We don't sell templates. We calculate, specify, and deliver under standards.
engineering.processStep1Desc: We capture operating conditions, material, dimensions, and client requirements.
engineering.processStep2Desc: Capacity, tension, and power calculation with component selection under CEMA Belt Book 7th Edition.
engineering.processStep3Desc: We deliver drawings, BOM, and calculation memos with complete specification.
engineering.processStep4Desc: Production with AISI 304 stainless steel and bolted construction as default.
engineering.processStep5Desc: Installation, alignment, splicing, and startup assisted by GBS engineers.
engineering.processStep6Desc: Direct technical support via WhatsApp and ongoing preventive maintenance.
engineering.ctaDescription: Start with a free technical diagnostic and get a professional brief with traceable reference.

cases.title: Case Studies
cases.subtitle: Real projects executed under GBS methodology
cases.empty: Case studies will be published soon.

resources.subtitle: Technical material for engineers and buyers
resources.glossaryCardDesc: Over 30 technical conveyor belt terms in ES and EN.
resources.catalogsCardDesc: Official light and heavy-duty line catalogs.

glossary.title: Technical Glossary
glossary.subtitle: Conveyor belt and industrial material handling technical terms

contact.title: Contact
contact.heroDescription: No complex forms. Message us directly on WhatsApp and a GBS engineer responds. No sales filters — technical response within 24 business hours.
contact.formDescription: Prefer to leave a message instead of starting a chat? Fill this in and we'll reply by email.
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Briefly describe your need — material to transport, approximate dimensions, city, etc.
contact.formSentDesc: We received your message. A GBS engineer will contact you within 24 business hours.
contact.formError: We couldn't send your message. Try WhatsApp or direct email.
contact.diagnosticBlockText: Generate your official GBS technical brief in 2 minutes. Includes CEMA preliminary calculations and a unique reference.

paymentPortal.title: Payment Portal
paymentPortal.subtitle: Three secure ways to pay your GBS Colombia invoice: Openpay (PSE / cards), Bancolombia QR or Bre-B key from your bank app.
paymentPortal.instructions: Clicking "Pay now" opens the Openpay payment gateway where you can complete your transaction via PSE, debit or credit card.
paymentPortal.contactAdvice: Questions about your invoice? Contact us on WhatsApp.
paymentPortal.fineprint: Your data is encrypted end-to-end to the provider. GBS Colombia does not store or access your financial information.
paymentPortal.qrSubtitle: Compatible with the Bancolombia app, Nequi and any Colombian payment-QR reader.
paymentPortal.breBSubtitle: Bre-B is Colombia's central-bank instant-payments network. Works from any Colombian bank.
paymentPortal.breBStep1: Open your bank app and go to the Bre-B transfers or payments section.
paymentPortal.breBStep2: Select "Pay with key" and paste or type GBS Colombia's key.
paymentPortal.breBStep3: Confirm the amount and your invoice description. The payment lands in seconds.

verify.title: Technical Brief Verification
verify.validDescription: This technical brief was officially generated by GBS Colombia.
verify.invalidDescription: The code you entered does not match a valid brief.

diagnosticV2.step0Subtitle: Pick a path. Each one is built for your specific need.
diagnosticV2.step0SupplyDesc: Standalone products, spare parts, splices, idlers, drives.
diagnosticV2.supplyHeavyDesc: Rubber, ST, multi-ply, steel cord, high capacity.
diagnosticV2.calcDisclaimer: Indicative calculations. A GBS engineer will validate and tune under CEMA Belt Book 7th Ed.
diagnosticV2.emailSentDesc: We received your request and a GBS engineer will reach out within 24 business hours.

assistant.title: GBS Technical Assistant
assistant.subtitle: Solve technical doubts about belts, components and industrial applications.
assistant.welcome: Hi, I'm the GBS Colombia technical assistant. I can help with conveyor belts, components, CEMA standards and industrial applications.
assistant.rateLimit: Too many questions in a row. Wait a moment or continue on WhatsApp.
assistant.error: We couldn't process your query. Try again or write us on WhatsApp.
assistant.scopeNotice: I only answer technical topics about belts and conveyors. For pricing, use the diagnostic or WhatsApp.

seo.lightDutyDescription: PU, PVC, silicone, and modular belts for food, pharmaceutical, logistics, and packaging.

seo.servicesDescription: Installation, splicing, maintenance, and turn-key projects.
